name: Kaival Brands Innovations Group, Inc.
summary: PART I . As used in this Report, the terms we, us, our, the Company, and Kaival refer to Kaival Brands Innovations Group, Inc., a Delaware corporation, unless otherwise indicated. The term Common Stock means our common stock, par value $0.001 per share.
